title: agrimonia pilosa var. coreana
intro: Agrimonia pilosa var. coreana, also known as Korean agrimony, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its hairy stems and yellow flowers. It has been traditionally used in Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Agrimonia pilosa var. coreana is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
